name: calendar
description: Google Calendar sync, tiered reminders for birthdays and important dates, and event management via your AI's own Google account.
postInstall:
1. Create a Google Cloud project and enable Calendar API.
2. Create a service account, share your calendar with it (or use an AI email like darin.my.pa@gmail.com).
3. Download the credentials JSON to .claude/data/calendar/credentials.json.
4. Add calendar-sync and calendar-digest jobs to .claude/cron/jobs.yaml.
5. See .claude/cron/calendar-README.md for the full walkthrough.
